meaning: n.(剧团)经理,乐队指挥,演出者,舞台监督
examples: He was Zyama Karp, the impresario of the Russian Riviera restaurant.
Music impresario Simon Cowell may top the record charts with his proteges , but could only manage a modest 43 in the best-dressed list.
I don't know if you're a fan of Seth MacFarlane, the impresario behind a succession of hit animated series like Family Guy and American Dad.
His job is to act as the impresario of London's many councils, boards and agencies.
Today, the hip-hop impresario has evolved into a celebrity, in the truest sense of the word.
